query_name:
SELECT
  c_last_name,
  c_first_name,
  ca_city,
  bought_city,
  ss_ticket_number,
  amt,
  profit
FROM (
    SELECT
      ss_ticket_number,
      ss_customer_sk,
      ca_city AS bought_city,
      SUM(ss_coupon_amt) AS amt,
      SUM(ss_net_profit) AS profit
    FROM READ_PARQUET('store_sales.parquet') AS store_sales, READ_PARQUET('date_dim.parquet') AS date_dim, READ_PARQUET('store.parquet') AS store, READ_PARQUET('household_demographics.parquet') AS household_demographics, READ_PARQUET('customer_address.parquet') AS customer_address
    WHERE
      store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
      AND store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
      AND store_sales.ss_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
      AND store_sales.ss_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
      AND (
        household_demographics.hd_dep_count = 4
        OR household_demographics.hd_vehicle_count = 3
      )
      AND date_dim.d_dow IN (6, 0)
      AND date_dim.d_year IN (1999, 1999 + 1, 1999 + 2)
      AND store.s_city IN ('Fairview', 'Midway')
    GROUP BY
      ss_ticket_number,
      ss_customer_sk,
      ss_addr_sk,
      ca_city
) AS dn, READ_PARQUET('customer.parquet') AS customer, READ_PARQUET('customer_address.parquet') AS current_addr
WHERE
  ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
  AND customer.c_current_addr_sk = current_addr.ca_address_sk
  AND current_addr.ca_city <> bought_city
ORDER BY
  c_last_name NULLS FIRST,
  c_first_name NULLS FIRST,
  ca_city NULLS FIRST,
  bought_city NULLS FIRST,
  ss_ticket_number NULLS FIRST
LIMIT 100
